hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：黎巴嫩的交火，使美伊和谈复杂化；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处；【FINANCE】尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Fighting Flares in Lebanon, Complicating U.S.-Iran Peace Talks
items.summary: Israeli strikes killed at least 31 people in Lebanon on Tuesday, the country’s health ministry said, as Israel intensified attacks against Hezbollah. The fighting cast further doubt on fragile negotiations to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：黎巴嫩的交火，使美伊和谈复杂化
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部表示，随着以色列加大对真主党的袭击力度，以色列周二在黎巴嫩发动空袭，造成至少 31 人死亡。这场战斗进一步让人们对结束美以与伊朗战争的脆弱谈判产生了进一步的怀疑。

items.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.summary: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.summary_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
items.summary: Companies reiterated plans to growing their prediction markets businesses in recent earnings calls even as a regulatory debate continues.
items.title_zh: 尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资
items.summary_zh: 尽管监管争论仍在继续，但公司在最近的财报电话会议上重申了发展预测市场业务的计划。

items.title: DeFi isn't safe anymore because AI is becoming 'superhuman' at hacking, security chief warns
items.summary: As hacks pile up and DeFi TVL falls fast, one of crypto's top security executives says AI coding agents have made smart contracts fatally vulnerable.
items.title_zh: 安全主管警告称，由于人工智能在黑客攻击方面正在变得“超人”，因此 DeFi 不再安全
items.summary_zh: 随着黑客事件的增多和 DeFi TVL 的快速下降，一位加密货币领域的高级安全高管表示，人工智能编码代理使智能合约变得极其脆弱。

items.title: The Wars in Ukraine and Iran Are More Alike Than You May Think
items.summary: Aspects such as drone technology and diplomacy show how the wars intersect on the battlefield and in global alignments, providing a model for future conflicts.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰和伊朗的战争比你想象的更相似
items.summary_zh: 无人机技术和外交等方面展示了战争如何在战场上和全球联盟中交叉，为未来的冲突提供了模型。

items.title: Whale alert: Someone dumped $1.29 billion of BlackRock's bitcoin ETF in a dark pool trade
items.summary: The big sale happened amid a broader continued exodus from U.S.-listed spot bitcoin ETFs.
items.title_zh: 鲸鱼警报：有人在暗池交易中抛售了贝莱德 12.9 亿美元的比特币 ETF
items.summary_zh: 此次大抛售发生在美国上市的现货比特币 ETF 持续大量资金外流的背景下。

items.title: Bitcoin vs gold: BTC's three-month uptrend has snapped
items.summary: BTC's three-month uptrend against gold has broken down amid strong inflows into gold and precious metals ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币 vs 黄金：BTC 三个月的上涨趋势已经结束
items.summary_zh: 由于大量资金流入黄金和贵金属 ETF，比特币兑黄金的三个月上涨趋势已被打破。

items.title: SoFi rolls out SoFiUSD stablecoin to banking app users
items.summary: SoFi rolls out bank-issued SoFiUSD stablecoin to 14.7 million members inside its app on Ethereum and Solana.
items.title_zh: SoFi 向银行应用程序用户推出 SoFiUSD 稳定币
items.summary_zh: SoFi 在以太坊和 Solana 的应用程序内向 1470 万会员推出银行发行的 SoFiUSD 稳定币。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs continue outflow streak amid $1.3 billion IBIT whale trade
items.summary: Bitcoin ETFs saw $334 million in net outflows on Tuesday, driven by $192 million exiting BlackRock's IBIT.
items.title_zh: 13 亿美元 IBIT 鲸鱼交易中，现货比特币 ETF 继续流出
items.summary_zh: 周二，比特币 ETF 出现 3.34 亿美元的净流出，其中 1.92 亿美元退出贝莱德 IBIT。

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
items.title_zh: OpenAI、Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 宣布战略内容合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 合作，将值得信赖的巴西新闻引入 ChatGPT，通过归属和透明度扩大对新闻的访问。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Pope Leo is concerned about AI replacing human work. Traders share his concern long term
items.summary: The leader of the Catholic Church warned about artificial intelligence upending the labor market. Traders on Kalshi see unemployment jumping before 2030.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥担心人工智能取代人类工作。交易员也分享了他的长期担忧
items.summary_zh: 天主教会领袖警告人工智能颠覆劳动力市场。卡尔希的交易员预计 2030 年前失业率将大幅上升。

items.title: Israeli strike in Gaza City kills new head of Hamas's military wing
items.summary: At least three people were killed in the attack, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.
items.title_zh: 以色列对加沙城的袭击杀死了哈马斯军事部门的新领导人
items.summary_zh: 尽管哈马斯已经停火，但袭击仍造成至少三人死亡。

items.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
items.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.
items.title_zh: 以色列加强打击，黎巴嫩数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示，在总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡发誓要“粉碎”伊朗支持的真主党后，它袭击了黎巴嫩的 100 个真主党基础设施​​和战斗人员。

items.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
items.summary: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.
items.title_zh: 伊朗谴责美国空袭“严重违反”停火协议
items.summary_zh: 袭击发生时，伊朗和卡塔尔谈判代表正在多哈进行和平谈判。

items.title: Can EU find a Russia whisperer to mediate an end to war in Ukraine?
items.summary: With the US pulling out of trilateral talks with Russia and Ukraine, the EU is looking for potential candidates to step in.
items.title_zh: 欧盟能否找到一位俄罗斯耳语者来调解结束乌克兰战争？
items.summary_zh: 随着美国退出与俄罗斯和乌克兰的三边谈判，欧盟正在寻找潜在的候选人介入。

items.title: High-Level British Spy Warns of Expanding Russia Threat
items.summary: The director of Britain’s electronic surveillance agency warns that Russia is only getting more brazen as battlefield losses in Ukraine mount.
items.title_zh: 英国高级间谍警告俄罗斯威胁扩大
items.summary_zh: 英国电子监视机构负责人警告说，随着乌克兰战场损失的增加，俄罗斯只会变得更加无耻。

items.title: SoFi brings bank-issued stablecoin to 15 million users in crypto push
items.summary: The fintech platform says its dollar-backed stablecoin will let members trade, transfer and eventually earn yield through its banking app.
items.title_zh: SoFi 将银行发行的稳定币推向 1500 万用户
items.summary_zh: 该金融科技平台表示，其美元支持的稳定币将允许会员通过其银行应用程序进行交易、转账并最终赚取收益。

items.title: South Korea arrests suspects behind Solana memecoin CatFi in first rugpull case under new law
items.summary: By using fake social media channels, the suspects allegedly lured thousands into buying Solana memecoin CatFi, before abandoning the project.
items.title_zh: 韩国根据新法律逮捕了首例 rugpull 案件中 Solana memecoin CatFi 背后的嫌疑人
items.summary_zh: 据称，犯罪嫌疑人利用虚假社交媒体渠道，诱骗数千人购买 Solana memecoin CatFi，然后放弃该项目。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Bitcoin clings to $75,000 support as bear market signals resurface
items.summary: Bitcoin hovered below Tom Lee's $76,000 bull-market threshold while hyperliquid and monero bucked broader crypto weakness.
items.title_zh: 随着熊市信号重新出现，比特币坚守 75,000 美元的支撑位
items.summary_zh: 比特币徘徊在 Tom Lee 设定的 76,000 美元牛市门槛以下，而超流动性和门罗币则顶住了更广泛的加密货币疲软。

items.title: Bitcoin drops to 13th largest asset as capital flees to AI and precious metals
items.summary: Bitcoin’s weak 2026 performance has coincided with sharp gains in metals and semiconductor giants, raising concerns that the cryptocurrency could continue losing ground.
items.title_zh: 随着资本逃往人工智能和贵金属，比特币跌至第 13 大资产
items.summary_zh: 比特币 2026 年表现疲弱，恰逢金属和半导体巨头大幅上涨，引发了人们对加密货币可能继续下跌的担忧。

items.title: Coinbase taps Standard Chartered to expand multi-currency funding rails for institutional clients
items.summary: Coinbase also relaunched Direct Deposit for U.S. customers, allowing users to automatically allocate a portion of their paycheck to crypto.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 携手渣打银行扩大机构客户的多币种融资渠道
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 还为美国客户重新推出了直接存款，允许用户自动将部分薪水分配给加密货币。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
items.title_zh: AWS 上的基础模型训练和推理的构建块

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
items.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英伟达宣布 1500 亿美元支出计划后，台湾芯片股上涨
items.summary_zh: 寒武纪等中国大陆芯片巨头的股价周三暴跌。

items.title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅
items.summary_zh: 受出口强劲、生产者价格上涨和上游产业增长的推动，4月份中国工业利润增速创两年多来最快。

items.title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
items.summary: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.
items.title_zh: 尽管欧盟推动降低风险，欧洲企业仍加倍投资中国制造业
items.summary_zh: 尽管欧盟面临减少海外依赖的压力，但中国较低的制造成本使许多欧洲企业的供应链留在了中国。

items.title: Piper Sandler says Strait of Hormuz to remain closed for months and oil to hit new highs
items.summary: Prolonged closure of Strait of Hormuz could send crude oil prices to new highs this summer.
items.title_zh: 派珀·桑德勒表示霍尔木兹海峡将关闭数月，油价将创下新高
items.summary_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的长期关闭可能会使今年夏天的原油价格创下新高。

items.title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
items.summary: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.
items.title_zh: 随着与英伟达和苹果的竞争加剧，华为计划于今年秋季推出新的智能手机芯片
items.summary_zh: 中国电信巨头华为周一宣布了一种新的芯片设计方法，可以提高其性能，尽管美国对该公司实施了限制。

items.title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
items.summary: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.
items.title_zh: APEC的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易上仍然存在很大分歧
items.summary_zh: 自特习会上周在北京结束以来，美国和中国官员多次会面并公开谈论不同的优先事项。

items.title: Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here’s what traders think
items.summary: After new stakes in quantum companies were revealed, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.
items.title_zh: 美国政府下一步将入股哪家公司？这是交易者的想法
items.summary_zh: 在量子公司的新股份公布后，预测市场平台 Kalshi 的交易员认为 IonQ、Micron 和 Anduril 可能是下一个。

items.title: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
items.summary: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局公布了建造永久月球基地的下一步措施
items.summary_zh: 美国宇航局计划将跳跃无人机和漫游车发送到月球，作为永久月球基地计划的一部分。

items.title: One killed and nine missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
items.summary: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.
items.title_zh: 美国造纸厂化学爆炸造成1人死亡、9人失踪
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州朗维尤一家造纸厂的储罐破裂，造成九人受伤，另有九人失踪。

items.title: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
items.summary: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 after more than 30 years on the run and put on trial last year.
items.title_zh: 女子逃亡30年后被捕，因持械抢劫被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 经过 30 多年的逃亡，克莱特终于于 2024 年在柏林的一套公寓中被捕，并于去年接受审判。

items.title: Hotel that refused to give tourist tap water acted lawfully, Italian court rules
items.summary: The Italian Supreme Court rejected a tourist's claim that her consumer rights were breached when she was only offered €7 bottled mineral water.
items.title_zh: 意大利法院裁定酒店拒绝向游客提供自来水行为合法
items.summary_zh: 意大利最高法院驳回了一名游客的申诉，称她只获得了 7 欧元的瓶装矿泉水，从而侵犯了她的消费者权利。

items.title: Trump-backed challenger beats veteran US senator in Texas primary
items.summary: The result sets up what will be a closely watched contest in November with Paxton's Democratic opponent.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的挑战者在德克萨斯州初选中击败美国资深参议员
items.summary_zh: 这一结果将使帕克斯顿在 11 月份与帕克斯顿的民主党对手之间展开一场备受关注的竞争。

items.title: YouTuber arrested for allegedly using AI to defame Korean actor
items.summary: The YouTuber allegedly made false claims that fuelled a career-ending scandal for Kim Soo-hyun.
items.title_zh: YouTuber 因涉嫌使用人工智能诽谤韩国演员而被捕
items.summary_zh: 据称，这位 YouTuber 的虚假言论引发了金秀贤职业生涯终结的丑闻。

items.title: Iranians Emerge From a ‘Black Hole’ as Internet Shutdown Eases
items.summary: After three months, the government is letting people connect with the world again. But not everyone has access, and those who do wonder how long it will last.
items.title_zh: 随着互联网关闭的缓解，伊朗人摆脱了“黑洞”
items.summary_zh: 三个月后，政府让人们再次与世界联系。但并不是每个人都可以访问，而那些访问的人也想知道它能持续多久。

items.title: Nigel Farage’s Far-Right Party Is Now Central to British Politics
items.summary: Nigel Farage’s anti-immigrant, populist agenda has helped his party, Reform U.K., emerge from the fringe of politics in Britain. But it faces an uphill climb to win power.
items.title_zh: 奈杰尔·法拉奇的极右翼政党现在是英国政治的核心
items.summary_zh: 奈杰尔·法拉奇的反移民、民粹主义议程帮助他的政党改革英国摆脱了英国政治的边缘。但要赢得权力，它面临着艰难的攀登。

items.title: Where Time Is Always 15 Minutes Apart From Everywhere Else
items.summary: In Nepal, a nation wedged between India and China, a unique time zone is just one expression of a singular national identity.
items.title_zh: 与其他地方的时间总是相差 15 分钟
items.summary_zh: 在尼泊尔这个夹在印度和中国之间的国家，独特的时区只是单一国家身份的一种表达。

items.title: Inventor of the Basque Cheesecake Plans to Retire. His Secret: He Prefers Chocolate
items.summary: Santiago Rivera is widely credited with creating the “burnt” cheesecake in the 1980s, though he doesn’t love the spinoffs it has spawned. Decades later, he’s preparing to hand over his kitchen to his children.
items.title_zh: 巴斯克芝士蛋糕的发明者计划退休。他的秘密：他更喜欢巧克力
items.summary_zh: 圣地亚哥·里维拉 (Santiago Rivera) 被广泛认为是 20 世纪 80 年代“烧焦”芝士蛋糕的创造者，尽管他并不喜欢它所衍生的衍生品。几十年后，他准备将厨房交给他的孩子们。

items.title: A Quiet Pacific Village Becomes China’s Security Testing Ground
items.summary: When a remote Pacific village asked for help with rowdy youth, the Chinese police arrived with a surveillance system. Then came the backlash.
items.title_zh: 安静的太平洋村庄成为中国的安全试验场
items.summary_zh: 当一个偏远的太平洋村庄向吵闹的年轻人寻求帮助时，中国警察带着监控系统赶到了。然后是强烈反对。

items.title: Threat of Deportations Leads to Risky Childbirth for Haitian Mothers
items.summary: Haitian women are having babies in squalid, unsupervised settings after the Dominican Republic started sending immigration agents to detain migrants at hospitals.
items.title_zh: 驱逐的威胁导致海地母亲面临危险的分娩
items.summary_zh: 在多米尼加共和国开始派遣移民人员在医院拘留移民后，海地妇女在肮脏、无人监管的环境中生下孩子。

items.title: Iceland, Rattled by Trump’s Greenland Threats, Weighs Joining the E.U.
items.summary: Iceland has stood apart from the rest of Europe. But President Trump’s threats to Greenland have provoked a reconsideration.
items.title_zh: 冰岛因特朗普的格陵兰威胁而考虑加入欧盟
items.summary_zh: 冰岛在欧洲其他国家中脱颖而出。但特朗普总统对格陵兰岛的威胁引发了人们的重新考虑。

items.title: Crypto exchange HTX rejects U.K. sanction allegations, says it refused ruble stablecoin listing
items.summary: U.K. authorities sanctioned HTX, saying there were "reasonable grounds to suspect" the crypto exchange was helping Russia by cooperating with ruble stablecoin A7A5.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易所 HTX 拒绝英国制裁指控，称其拒绝卢布稳定币上市
items.summary_zh: 英国当局制裁了 HTX，称有“合理的理由怀疑”该加密货币交易所正在通过与卢布稳定币 A7A5 合作来帮助俄罗斯。

items.title: IREN shares jumps on $1.6 billion Dell deal to expand AI cloud business
items.summary: The Dell agreement will support IREN’s expanding AI cloud business and boost projected annualized revenue to $4.4 billion by 2027.
items.title_zh: 戴尔收购 16 亿美元扩大人工智能云业务，IREN 股价上涨
items.summary_zh: 戴尔协议将支持 IREN 不断扩大的人工智能云业务，并将预计年收入到 2027 年提高至 44 亿美元。

items.title: Crypto PACs spend $9 million in Texas and score wins in both parties
items.summary: Industry-backed PACs supported Democratic and Republican candidates alike, underscoring digital assets’ growing role as a cross-party electoral force.
items.title_zh: Crypto PAC 在德克萨斯州花费 900 万美元并在两党中获胜
items.summary_zh: 行业支持的政治行动委员会同时支持民主党和共和党候选人，凸显了数字资产作为跨党派选举力量的日益重要的作用。

items.title: XRP steadies near $1.32 as failed breakout keeps focus on narrowing trading range
items.summary: XRP stayed trapped inside the same consolidation structure after another rejection near $1.36, with traders watching whether months of compression finally resolve into a larger move.
items.title_zh: XRP 稳定在 1.32 美元附近，因失败的突破继续关注缩小交易区间
items.summary_zh: 在再次遭到 1.36 美元附近的拒绝后，XRP 仍被困在相同的盘整结构中，交易员们正在关注数月的压缩是否最终会转化为更大的走势。

items.title: Singapore charges ex-Hodlnaut CEO over allegedly misleading claims tied to Terra collapse, faces up to 20 years in prison
items.summary: Authorities alleged that the former CEO distributed claims stating that the company had not been impacted by the 2022 collapse of TerraUSD.
items.title_zh: 新加坡指控前 Hodlnaut 首席执行官涉嫌与 Terra 倒塌有关的误导性言论，面临最高 20 年监禁
items.summary_zh: 当局声称，前首席执行官散布声明称该公司并未受到 2022 年 TerraUSD 崩溃的影响。

items.title: China’s top court to study judicial rules for crypto amid rise in related cases
items.summary: The judge's remark builds on a February joint notice that broadened the country's crackdown on crypto-related activities.
items.title_zh: 随着相关案件的增加，中国最高法院将研究加密货币司法规则
items.summary_zh: 法官的言论是基于 2 月份的联合通知，该通知扩大了该国对加密货币相关活动的打击力度。

items.title: OpenZeppelin founder says he now considers ‘all of DeFi’ unsafe
items.summary: OpenZeppelin's Manuel Aráoz said he has been privately advising friends and family to exit all DeFi positions.
items.title_zh: OpenZeppelin 创始人表示，他现在认为“所有 DeFi”都不安全
items.summary_zh: OpenZeppelin 的 Manuel Aráoz 表示，他一直在私下建议朋友和家人退出所有 DeFi 头寸。

items.title: Pro-crypto Menefee unseats Al Green in Texas Democratic primary runoff, supported by Fairshake
items.summary: This follows millions of dollars in crypto super PAC spending that backed Menefee and opposed Green, a vocal critic of crypto.
items.title_zh: 在 Fairshake 的支持下，支持加密货币的 Menefee 在德克萨斯州民主党初选中击败 Al Green
items.summary_zh: 在此之前，加密货币超级政治行动委员会支出了数百万美元，支持梅尼菲并反对加密货币的直言不讳的批评者格林。

items.title: ‘Critically important’: President Trump backs CFTC Chair Selig’s push to expand prediction market authority
items.summary: President Donald Trump is publicly backing his CFTC Chair Michael Selig in his push to have authority over prediction markets.
items.title_zh: “至关重要”：特朗普总统支持 CFTC 主席塞利格推动扩大预测市场权威
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统公开支持美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 主席迈克尔·塞利格 (Michael Selig) 推动对预测市场的权威。

items.title: DeFi TVL slides 14% since KelpDAO exploit as risk appetite retreats
items.summary: DeFi outflows have deepened five weeks after the KelpDAO breach exposed new infrastructure risks.
items.title_zh: 随着风险偏好回落，自 KelpDAO 被利用以来 DeFi TVL 下滑 14%
items.summary_zh: KelpDAO 漏洞暴露出新的基础设施风险五周后，DeFi 资金外流加剧。

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.title_zh: 赶上 Google I/O 2026 的对话舞台。
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
